Gemini API Docs and API Reference

## Docs

- (https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs.md.txt): Gemini API Docs and API Reference
- [Google AI Studio quickstart](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/ai-studio-quickstart.md.txt): Documentation for Google's Gemini API.
- [Build Android Apps in Google AI Studio](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/aistudio-android.md.txt): Learn how to build native Android apps with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose in Google AI Studio.
- [Build apps in Google AI Studio](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/aistudio-build-mode.md.txt): Learn how to build full-stack applications using the vibe coding experience in Google AI Studio.
- [Develop Full-Stack Apps in Google AI Studio](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/aistudio-fullstack.md.txt): Learn how to develop full-stack applications with server-side logic in Google AI Studio.
- [Antigravity Agent](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/antigravity-agent.md.txt): Use the Antigravity managed agent to perform multi-step tasks that require reasoning, file operations, and tool use.
- (https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/audio.md.txt): Documentation for Google's Gemini generateContent API.
- [Available regions for Google AI Studio and Gemini API](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/available-regions.md.txt): Documentation for Google's Gemini API.
- [Billing](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/billing.md.txt): Documentation for Google's Gemini API.
- (https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/caching.md.txt): Learn how to use Context Caching in the Gemini API
- [Embeddings](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/embeddings.md.txt): Documentation for Google's Gemini API.
- [Feedback](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/feedback-policies.md.txt): Documentation for Google's Gemini API.
- [Flex inference](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/flex-inference.md.txt): Learn how to optimize costs with the Flex inference tier
- (https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/gemini-3.md.txt): Learn about the new features of Gemini 3 in the Gemini API.
- (https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/google-search.md.txt): Ground your model&#39;s responses in real-time information from Google Search to improve factual accuracy and provide citations.
- (https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/image-generation.md.txt): Get started generating images with the Gemini API using Nano Banana and Nano Banana Pro
- (https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/image-understanding.md.txt): Get started building with Gemini&#39;s multimodal capabilities in the Gemini API
- [Generate images using Imagen](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/imagen.md.txt): Get started generating images with the Gemini API
- (https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/interactions.md.txt): Get started building with the next-generation Gemini API using Interactions.
- [Interactions API: Breaking changes migration guide (May 2026)](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/interactions-breaking-changes-may-2026.md.txt): Guide for migrating to upcoming breaking changes in the Interactions API, including the steps schema and response format changes.
- (https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/interactions/document-processing.md.txt): Learn how to use the Gemini API to process documents like PDFs
- (https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/interactions/file-search.md.txt): Get started building RAG solutions with the File Search tool in the Gemini API
- (https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/interactions/files.md.txt): Documentation for Google's Gemini Interactions API.
- (https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/interactions/function-calling.md.txt): Get started using Function Calling with the Gemini API
- (https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/interactions/gemini-3.md.txt): Learn about the new features of Gemini 3 in the Gemini API.
- (https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/interactions/google-search.md.txt): Ground your model&#39;s responses in real-time information from Google Search to improve factual accuracy and provide citations.
- (https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/interactions/image-understanding.md.txt): Get started building with Gemini&#39;s multimodal capabilities in the Gemini API
- [Grounding with Google Maps](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/interactions/maps-grounding.md.txt): Ground your model&#39;s responses in rich, real-world data from Google Maps to provide factually accurate, location-aware answers
- (https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/interactions/music-generation.md.txt): Generate music with the Gemini API using Lyria 3 Clip and Lyria 3 Pro.
- (https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/interactions/priority-inference.md.txt): Learn how to optimize latency with the Priority inference tier in the Interactions API
- (https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/interactions/speech-generation.md.txt): Get started generating audio with the Gemini API
- (https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/interactions/streaming.md.txt): Stream Interactions API responses using server-sent events (SSE)
- (https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/interactions/structured-output.md.txt): Learn how to generate structured JSON output with the Gemini API.
- (https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/interactions/tokens.md.txt): Understand and count tokens with the Gemini API
- (https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/interactions/url-context.md.txt): Ground your model&#39;s responses in real-time information by providing URLs as context for more accurate and citation-backed answers.
- (https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/interactions/video-understanding.md.txt): Get started building with Gemini&#39;s multimodal capabilities in the Gemini API
- (https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/interactions/webhooks.md.txt): Learn how to use webhooks in the Gemini API.
- (https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/interactions/whats-new-gemini-3.5.md.txt): Learn about the new features and migration guidance for Gemini 3.5 Flash.
- [ReAct agent from scratch with Gemini and LangGraph](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/langgraph-example.md.txt): Building LangGraph Agents with Gemini
- [LearnLM](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/learnlm.md.txt): Documentation for Google's Gemini API.
- [Live API best practices](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/live-api/best-practices.md.txt): Documentation for Google's Gemini API.
- [Ephemeral tokens](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/live-api/ephemeral-tokens.md.txt): Documentation for Google's Gemini API.
- [Get started with Gemini Live API using the Google GenAI SDK](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/live-api/get-started-sdk.md.txt): Documentation for Google's Gemini API.
- [Session management with Live API](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/live-api/session-management.md.txt): Documentation for Google's Gemini API.
- [Data Logging and Sharing](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/logs-policy.md.txt): The policy for sharing your data logs for Gemini improvements.
- [Managed Agents Quickstart](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/managed-agents-quickstart.md.txt): Quickstart guide for making your first call to the manage agents API.
- [Grounding with Google Maps](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/maps-grounding.md.txt): Ground your model&#39;s responses in rich, real-world data from Google Maps to provide factually accurate, location-aware answers
- (https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/media-resolution.md.txt): Learn about how to use media resolutions with multimodal inputs.
- [Migrating to the Interactions API](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/migrate-to-interactions.md.txt): Guide for migrating from generateContent to the Interactions API.
- [Models](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/models.md.txt): Learn about all of Google&#39;s most advanced AI models

- [Using Tools with Gemini API](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/tools.md.txt): Use tools with the Gemini API to extend the capabilities of Gemini models, enabling them to access real-time information and perform complex computational tasks.
- (https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/url-context.md.txt): Documentation for Google's Gemini generateContent API.
- [Webhooks](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/webhooks.md.txt): Learn how to use webhooks in the Gemini API.
